New Security Gap: Your WAF Has No Idea What Your AI Is Doing
WEBINAR

PT

GST

New Security Gap: Your WAF Has No Idea What Your AI Is Doing

If you have shipped an AI feature or connected an AI model to your internal systems in the last 12 months, you have APIs in production that your WAF cannot evaluate. Not because your WAF is misconfigured, but because it was never built for this.

‍

Signature-based rules depend on knowing what an attack looks like before it arrives. AI-generated traffic does not follow patterns those rules were written to match. Attackers understand that, and they are already taking advantage of it.

‍

In this webcast, we will get into why signature-based protection breaks down in AI-first environments, what behavioral detection and positive security models actually look like in production, and what it takes to evaluate whether your runtime tools are genuinely adapting to your environment or just adding noise to your stack.

‍

What you will walk away with:

  • A clear picture of where your WAF is blind to the traffic your AI systems are generating
  • Confidence to evaluate behavioral detection and ML-driven approaches 
  • A framework for making the case internally to move beyond rules-based protection
  • Concrete next steps you can act on immediately

‍

All registrants will receive the full recording after the webinar.

‍
